title: Python AI Course
subtitle: From Beginner to Job-Ready in 3–6 Months
description: Learn Python, AI, and real-world application development through live, mentor-led training. Build projects using modern tools, APIs, and LLMs to become job-ready in today’s AI-driven tech industry.

projects.title: Command-Line Automation Tool
projects.description: Understand core Python concepts by building a working automation script.

projects.title: Interactive Logic-Based Game
projects.description: Apply conditions and loops to create an interactive number-based game.

projects.title: Task Manager with File Handling
projects.description: Build a simple command-line tool to manage daily tasks and understand file I/O.

projects.title: API-Based AI Application
projects.description: Integrate external APIs and LLMs to build an intelligent application.

requirements: No prior experience required—just consistency and willingness to learn.
Complete beginners with no coding experience
Students aiming for AI or development careers

curriculum.title: Python Foundations

lessons.title: Intro to Python: Installation and Hello World
Variables, Data Types, and Type Casting

curriculum.practice: Building a basic BMI or Currency Converter calculator
curriculum.outcome: Students can write simple scripts and understand how computers store information.

curriculum.title: Control Flow & Data Structures

lessons.title: Loops: For & While loops with range

curriculum.practice: Creating a mini To-Do List or Grocery List app
curriculum.outcome: Students can implement logic and manage collections of data efficiently.

curriculum.title: Functions & Logic Building

lessons.title: Defining functions, parameters, and return values

curriculum.practice: Building a functional 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' game
curriculum.outcome: Students can write reusable, modular code and break down complex problems.

curriculum.title: File Handling & Error Handling
curriculum.practice: Building a password manager that saves to a file
curriculum.outcome: Students can work with external data and build error-resistant programs.

curriculum.title: Advanced Python & Algorithms

lessons.title: Intro to basic sorting and searching algorithms

curriculum.practice: Solving logic puzzles using advanced Python features
curriculum.outcome: Students can write highly optimized and performance-oriented code.

curriculum.title: OOPs & Git Version Control

lessons.title: Git basics: GitHub repos, commits, push workflow

curriculum.practice: Student record class and publishing to GitHub
curriculum.outcome: Students can build class-based programs and publish work professionally.

curriculum.title: APIs, SQL & AI Basics

lessons.title: Prompt Engineering & intro to LLM APIs

curriculum.practice: Weather app and prompt design practice
curriculum.outcome: Students gain exposure to data querying, APIs, and AI workflow concepts.

curriculum.title: Capstone & Job Readiness
curriculum.practice: Final capstone, README, and mock interview
curriculum.outcome: Students finish with a portfolio-ready project and fresher job readiness.

features: Designed for beginners and career switchers
Focus on real-world application, not just theory
Learn AI tools, APIs, and automation workflows

testimonials.name: ALEX M.
testimonials.text: I had no coding background before starting this course. The way concepts are explained made it very easy to follow. I was able to build small programs on my own within a few weeks.

testimonials.name: FATIMA K.
testimonials.text: This course helped me understand Python in a simple and practical way. The projects made a big difference because I could actually apply what I learned.
